name: com.fidacy/mcp
description: Payment firewall for AI agents: a signed, independently-verifiable verdict on every money-moving action. Blocks wrong-payee, over-cap, and duplicate-invoice fraud before money moves. Non-custodial, local-first, free.

environment_variables.name: FIDACY_ENGINE_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Optional: enables signed trust verdicts (assess_action) from the live engine.

environment_variables.name: FIDACY_MODE
environment_variables.description: Optional: 'http' to use the hosted paid core (requires FIDACY_API_URL + FIDACY_API_KEY). Defaults to local dev mode.

environment_variables.name: FIDACY_DISABLE_TELEMETRY
environment_variables.description: Optional: set to 1 to disable anonymous usage telemetry.
